markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Q1 conversion strategy and address attribution challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Attribution is broken:** HubSpot misattributes \~90% of MQLs to "direct" traffic, making it impossible to measure channel ROI and optimize spend.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [**High traffic, low conversion:** A "Tools Pages" strategy quadrupled traffic but yields few conversions, likely due to a mismatch between content intent and the current "Book a Demo" CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Immediate test:** Replace the "Book a Demo" CTA on high-traffic blog and tools pages with a "Free Trial" option, which is a lower-friction ask for the technical IT audience.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**New content strategy:** Pivot from a high-effort ROI calculator to creating assets that convey the product's "aha moment," such as recorded group demos or integration-specific landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Broken Attribution & Low Conversion

  - [**Context:** Website traffic has quadrupled, creating pressure to hit aggressive MQL goals for the upcoming Series A fundraising round.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [**Attribution Failure:** HubSpot misattributes \~90% of MQLs to "direct" traffic, masking the true performance of channels like organic search.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [**Low Conversion:** High-traffic "Tools Pages" (inspired by Ramp) generate traffic but few conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The "Book a Demo" CTA is a high-friction ask for the technical IT audience.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The content attracts a broad audience, and Siit isn't effectively capturing the ICP within that traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### The Solution: Immediate Tests & New Content Strategy

  - [**Immediate Test:** Replace the "Book a Demo" CTA with a "Free Trial" CTA on high-traffic blog and tools pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A trial is a lower-friction ask for a technical audience, allowing them to "touch and feel" the product first.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:** Pivot from a high-effort ROI calculator to assets that convey the product's "aha moment."](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The ROI calculator is high-effort, low-trust, and better suited for traffic generation than conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**New Ideas:**](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
          - [**Group Demos:** Host weekly, themed group demos (e.g., "Office Hours") to provide a lower-pressure alternative to a 1-on-1 demo.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
          - [**Integration-Specific Pages:** Create landing pages showing how Siit integrates with specific tools (e.g., Okta, JumpCloud).](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
          - [**"How to Deploy X" Content:** Explore programmatic content for deploying specific apps, though feasibility is uncertain.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)

### Technical & Strategic Considerations

  - [**Website Redesign:** A full site rebuild is launching in a few weeks with new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [**Risk:** Sunsetting the French site and redirecting it to the English site will likely cause a temporary drop in French-market rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
      - [**Mitigation:** Ensure all URL changes (e.g., trailing slashes, www vs. non-www) are handled correctly with 301 redirects to minimize SEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [**Competitor Pages:** Revisit the idea of creating dedicated competitor comparison pages, a strategy used by competitor Serval.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** Analyze which articles are driving traffic from Large Language Models (LLMs) to inform future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
      - [Test swapping the "Book a Demo" CTA for a "Free Trial" CTA on blog and tools pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
      - [Revisit the idea of creating competitor comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)
      - [Analyze which articles are driving traffic from LLMs and report findings.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)
      - [Provide guidance on the technical aspects of sunsetting the French website.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [Investigate the accuracy of GA4 event tracking for trial sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/9NvGKzpnZxiqTDeU4ryD3tR-ygLxzd9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
